title: Mateu UIDL Schema
description: JSON Schema for Mateu UI Definition Language (UIDL) components. Use the 'type' discriminator field to identify the concrete component type.

Component.description: Any UI component. Use the 'type' field to indicate the concrete component.

Actionable.description: A navigable/clickable menu item or link.

GridContent.description: A column definition inside a Grid.

FormEditor.description: A form-definition editor component. 'value' is the JSON FormDefinition string.

Workflow.description: A workflow-definition editor component. 'value' is the JSON WorkflowDefinition string.

WorkflowElk.description: A workflow-definition editor using ELK for graph layout. 'value' is the JSON WorkflowDefinition string.
